entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia where the study on grain-based nutrition is focused

entities.name: CALORIE DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state of lacking sufficient caloric intake, affecting about 26% of the Indian population

entities.name: PROTEIN DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A state of lacking sufficient protein intake, affecting about 28% of the Indian population

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A deficit of essential micronutrients, particularly iron and zinc, alarming among children and women

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for increase in crop varieties to combat deficiency

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for increase in crop varieties to combat deficiency

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition resulting from a lack of essential micronutrients in the developing world

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTATION
entities.description: The provision of vitamin and mineral supplements to combat malnutrition

entities.name: FOOD FORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of adding micronutrients to foods during processing

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of selecting or developing crop varieties for increased nutrient content

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain (Sorghum bicolor) being bred for increased micronutrient content

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal grain (Pennisetum glaucum) being bred for increased micronutrient content

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which breeds nutrient-rich cultivars

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A climatic region where ICRISAT aims to address micronutrient deficiency

entities.name: HARVESTPLUS
entities.description: An organization providing funding support for the breeding of micronutrient-rich crops

entities.name: NUTRIENT INTAKE
entities.description: The dietary contribution of nutrients consumed in specific production and consumption regions

relationships.description: Population in India is deficient in calories
Population in India is deficient in protein
Iron deficit is a key component of micronutrient deficiency
Zinc deficit is a key component of micronutrient deficiency
Supplementation is used to combat micronutrient malnutrition
Food fortification is used to combat micronutrient malnutrition
Sorghum is being bred for increased micronutrients
Pearl millet is being bred for increased micronutrients
Breeding is used to increase iron content in crops
Breeding is used to increase zinc content in crops
ICRISAT is breeding micronutrient-rich sorghum cultivars
ICRISAT is breeding micronutrient-rich pearl millet cultivars
ICRISAT addresses micronutrient deficiency in the semi-arid tropics
HarvestPlus provides funding support to ICRISAT
Sorghum is produced and consumed in major regions of India
Pearl millet is produced and consumed in major regions of India
Understanding nutrient intake helps quantify micronutrient deficiency
